channel.title: Adrian Marikar
channel.description: Notes, builds, and essays by Adrian Marikar.

item.title: RaceEdge: Building a Transparent UK & Ireland Racing Research App
item.description: A build log on raceedge.uk, a real-data UK and Ireland racing research app with explainable scoring, paper tracking, bankroll planning, and Coolify deployment.

item.title: My AI App Factory: Hetzner, Hermes, Coolify, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Telegram
item.description: A practical step-by-step guide to using a VPS, multiple Hermes agents, Coolify, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Telegram to build and deploy apps with AI.
